summary: Complete testing of TradeLife premium dark SaaS UI redesign with 3-theme system. All backend APIs working (12/12 tests passed). Frontend dark glassmorphism UI, onboarding flow with theme selection, dashboard 3-column layout, and theme switching functionality fully operational.
passed_tests: All 12 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Login page dark glassmorphism UI with validation
Signup page dark UI with field validation
Onboarding flow: business type → theme selection (all 5 steps)
Dashboard 3-column layout (left: Attention/Projects/Trades, center: AI Core/transactions, right: Schedule/Tasks/Financial)
Theme switching via settings panel with instant UI updates
Transaction data display from Supabase (4 Business, 1 Personal, £355 total)
Review transactions page with dark theme styling
Classification buttons functional on review page
